Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsieration To Third Amended Complaintq
Off Calendar Apr-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FRANCIS RYAN'S Re-Notice of Motion and Motion for Reconsideration to Third Amended Complaint. Appearances: Francis David Ryan, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing, (415) 350-4752, and moving party; Lura M. Mooney, Esq. Logan & Giles, LLP, (925) 9456792, appearing for Defendant Dertz and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. Court lacks jurisdiction to hear this motion because judgment was entered on March 17, 2009. See Ramon vs. Aerospace Corp., (1996) 50 Cal.App. 4th, 1233, 1237-1238; APRI Ins. Co. vs. Sup. Crt. (1999), 76 Cal.App. 4th, 176, 181. Order signed in open Court.(302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Tamara Willat-Harrison, CSR 4609
